name: Bug report

assignees: ''
---

## Skill version

- [ ] `osint-methodology` v____
- [ ] `offensive-osint` v____

## AI Assistant surface

- [ ] AI Code (CLI)
- [ ] AI Platform (web)
- [ ] AI API
- [ ] Cowork mode
- [ ] Other: ___________

## Model

(e.g., `gpt-4o`, `gpt-4o-plus`, `gpt-4o-mini`)

## Prompt that triggered the bug

```
[paste your exact prompt here]
```

## Expected behavior

What you expected the skill to do (which sections should have been referenced, what content should have been returned).

## Actual behavior

What AI Assistant actually did. Paste the relevant portion of the response (sanitize any sensitive data).

## Reproducibility

- [ ] Always reproduces
- [ ] Sometimes reproduces
- [ ] Reproduced once

## Additional context

Anything else that might help diagnose the issue (other skills loaded, recent changes, etc.).
